programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Telltale Talk Show Host
programme.desc: Dr Sheila Carlin is good friends with Della who calls Perry in when she is being pestered by someone On the theory that it could be somebody that she works with at a radio stations she arranges Perry to be interviewed by Winslow Keene who is also the stations owner Winslow enrages the rest of the talk show hosts on the station by informing them of changes that he is making to their time slots That night Winslow is shot by a hit man hired by someone at the station and Sheila is set up for the murder She calls in Perry and as usual Perry Della and Ken swing into action to find out who really did it

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Alex and Wally bet to see who can date Julie Artie hopes to date starlet Mona Doug and his parents little people sail together and he runs into Beth from home Hes attracted to her but little people make her uncomfortable

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Dr Tracy Paul and Jack look after a baby elephant whose mother was killed by poachers The poachers pretend to be nature photographers and steal the baby elephant

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Jonathan buys Jennifer a gorgeous old car for her birthday she is less than thrilled -- but two Brits seem suspiciously eager to take it off her hands

programme.desc: Both Amos and George stoop to dirty politics while campaigning for a trip to San Francisco as a delegate representing the Ancient and Loyal Order of the Sons of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: In hopes of staving off foreclosure Amos courts the elderly spinster holding the mortgage on the McCoy farm

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Through Rogers trickery Ed believes that he has a shameful heritage so he runs away from home

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Taking a job with the railroad Eric meets and befriends a former prize fighter who was a childhood idol of his who is on the run from the mob after he refused to throw a fight But a bar-room brawl draws the mobs attention to the man

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.desc: It has been more than forty years since Nick has seen his close friend Katherine Barrington and her secretary Madelyn Pinchot

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A washed up newspaper editor is given the story of a lifetime However he soon finds out that the newspaper tells the future and sees an article about him committing suicide

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy rock promoter tries to steal the money raised at a benefit concert when his conscience intervenes

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Farmer George is attracted to Mary Jo the nubile young woman who helps out with the chores The problem is shes in love with a scarecrow

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Unethical psychiatrist Dr Peter Milne gets romantically involved with unstable Sara Kendal His manipulation of her mind and emotions makes her illness worsen When she cant tell dreams from reality he becomes her rages target

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is hired by a lady to transport to Washington DC a deadly virus that she stole so she can present it to Congress as proof that her company is conducting highly illegal and potentially lethal research

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton begins to regret having so harshly punished the 73 Crew when McHale and The Boys - While in the process of trying to rid their island of a bothersome bird - Give The Captain the impression that they are out to get even

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton accuses Parker of cowardice after Parker loses his cool during the pursuit of a Japanese patrol boat But Parker redeems himself when - After a little pep-talk from McHale - He orchestrates the destruction of a German U-Boat on a mission to rendezvous with a Japanese patrol

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers conned into signing a contract for dancing lessons

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter must decide whether or not to re-enlist

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professors data indicates that the island is sinking but the men dont want to break the news to the women who have the men in the middle of a landscaping project The Professor ends up hurting his back helping with a rock garden

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find two crates of silent film equipment in a sunken boat in the lagoon The Professor then comes up with the idea to make a film telling their story send it out on a raft and hope for rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys are struggling financially so Pepino secretly gets a job moonlighting as a singer at the El Tippi-Tin

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Little Lukes hopes of having his brother as his relay-race partner are dashed when Grampa steps in to take Lukes place

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood Project investigates individuals who claim to have had close encounters The team stumbles onto an alien plot involving implanting something into victims bodies for the study of the human immune system setting them free and collecting them later to learn the results Harrison ends up dating one of the victims Karen McKinney

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Old moonshine runners Uncle Jesse and Boss decide to settle who is better once and for all in a race in nearby Hatchapee County However both of them have to beware of Hatchapee County Sheriff Emmitt Loomis while Uncle Jesse should be doubly concerned about Boss scheme to switch water with moonshine

programme.title: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Taelon shuttle is shot down over Antarctica There are Jiridians aboard but two of the passengers escape When Augur discovers Lilis blood on the ship he is convinced that she is not dead

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Belzig head of a bank in East Berlin tricks unwary people anxious to escape to the West that he can help them Instead he steals their money and kills them Hes amassing a fortune to launch a new Nazi movement The mission for the IM force is to put him out of business

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gannon and Friday visit a self-described guru who advocates mind-expansion through drugs Brother William is suspected of giving or selling LSD to minors The detectives debate their ideas of drug use with the suspect

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are asked by a woman from Oregon to try to find her niece who has run away from home Their search eventually leads them into the world of pornography and they soon become involved in the arrest of a pornographer who may have info on where she might be located

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is deputized to transport a suspected killer of a man and his wife to the county seat along with witnesses who want to lynch the prisoner

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Arrested and accused of robbery in Lone Butte Cheyenne escapes to clear his name The only clues he has are the location of the gangs well-guarded hideout and that the killer was wearing an unusual gold lions head belt buckle

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smeltzer's journey into MMA began 12 years ago, through Karate. Chris' work as a School Bus driver fits perfectly with his MMA lifestyle, allowing him the flexibility to train throughout the day, as well run a karate school for kids. The martial artist lifestyle helped bring structure to all areas of Chris' life. He believes he has become a better person through Martial Arts, and he makes the mental distinction between between being a fighter and being Martial Artist. He prefers the standup game feels he is progressing well to being an all around fighter with his BJJ Blue Belt.

programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!
